response: On March 15, 2024 at 14:23 UTC, a magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck near Tokyo (35.6° N, 139.7° E) at a depth of 15 km, prompting a tsunami warning. The quake affected about 2.3 million people, caused an estimated $4.5 billion in damage and has so far left 12 confirmed casualties. Emergency teams remain on high alert as recovery efforts continue.
